title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Group India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Group India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Group India in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Group India:
Landmark Group India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
